name: Cell Energy Optimisation Validation
trigger: Energy management system proposes cell sleeping for 47 low-traffic cells. Active probe confirms coverage impact before execution.

autonomyLevels.L1: Engineer reviews probe coverage data before approving cell sleep schedule.
autonomyLevels.L2: Cell sleeping applied automatically within pre-validated coverage boundaries.
autonomyLevels.L3: Dynamic cell sleeping adjusted in real time based on continuous probe feedback.
autonomyLevels.L4: Autonomous energy optimisation continuously validated against delivered coverage. No human approval required.

economicOutcome: Energy savings achieved without coverage degradation or subscriber impact.
economicCalculation: Average energy cost per active cell site: €15K–€25K/year. 10% reduction across 500 sites = €750K–€1.25M annual saving. Zero churn cost if coverage impact is validated before execution.
combinationUpgrade: None required for validation. Drive test (Keysight Nemo) can provide periodic deep validation in high-risk areas.
